svg.title: Array capacity doubling as elements are added
svg.desc: Shows an empty array with 8 slots indexed 0 through 7, captioned that capacity doubles each time it's exceeded. Below, a progression: an array holding just 5, then doubling to hold 5 and 6, then doubling again to hold 5, 6, 7, 8, and finally doubling once more to hold 5 through 12.
svg.text: Capacity doubles every time it runs out
